table.name: Expanded variant
table.description: A full navigation state exposing all anchor links on smaller screens, with a chevron button to collapse the list.

table.name: Chevron button
table.description: A chevron button used to expand and collapse the navigation list.

table.name: Collapsed variant
table.description: A collapsed navigation bar displaying the current section from the primary-level items on smaller screens, with a chevron button to reveal the expanded variant.

table.name: Secondary item heading
table.description: An optional secondary level can be added, which maps to the next heading hierarchy.

table.name: Primary item heading
table.description: A primary level item heading that maps to H2 headings by default. If the component is manually scoped to a specific content area, the primary level can map to H3 headings instead

table.name: Active item indicator
table.description: A visual indicator that marks the currently visible section. Only one item can be active at a time.

table.name: Anchor link item
table.description: Anchor link items that navigate to corresponding sections, with default, hover, and active states, and an optional secondary level.

table.name: Heading
table.description: An optional heading that indicates the scope and purpose of the items displayed beneath it. Only be used when it targets a specific content group, not the entire page.
